understood_request: The user wants to calculate the scrap rate (scrapped quantity / total quantity started, or similar ratio) for each product that has work orders, and return the top 10 worst (highest scrap rate) products. This requires work order data from erp.work_orders, which has not yet been loaded into the vault.

vault.ddl:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS hub_work_order (
  work_order_hk VARCHAR(32) PRIMARY KEY,
  work_order_bk VARCHAR NOT NULL,
  load_dts TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  record_source VARCHAR NOT NULL
)
vault.load_sql:
INSERT INTO hub_work_order
SELECT DISTINCT
  md5(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(wo_id AS VARCHAR)))) AS work_order_hk,
  CAST(wo_id AS VARCHAR) AS work_order_bk,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS load_dts,
  'erp.work_orders' AS record_source
FROM stg_erp_work_orders
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM hub_work_order h
  WHERE h.work_order_bk = CAST(stg_erp_work_orders.wo_id AS VARCHAR)
)

vault.ddl:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS lnk_product_work_order (
  product_work_order_hk VARCHAR(32) PRIMARY KEY,
  product_hk VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
  work_order_hk VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
  load_dts TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  record_source VARCHAR NOT NULL
)
vault.load_sql:
INSERT INTO lnk_product_work_order
SELECT DISTINCT
  md5(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(p.product_id AS VARCHAR))) || '|' || UPPER(TRIM(CAST(wo.wo_id AS VARCHAR)))) AS product_work_order_hk,
  md5(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(p.product_id AS VARCHAR)))) AS product_hk,
  md5(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(wo.wo_id AS VARCHAR)))) AS work_order_hk,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS load_dts,
  'erp.work_orders' AS record_source
FROM stg_erp_work_orders wo
JOIN stg_erp_products p ON wo.product_id = p.product_id
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM lnk_product_work_order l
  WHERE l.product_work_order_hk = md5(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(p.product_id AS VARCHAR))) || '|' || UPPER(TRIM(CAST(wo.wo_id AS VARCHAR))))
)

vault.ddl:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sat_work_order_details (
  work_order_hk VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
  load_dts TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  load_end_dts TIMESTAMP,
  record_source VARCHAR NOT NULL,
  hashdiff VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
  qty_required BIGINT,
  qty_stocked BIGINT,
  qty_scrapped BIGINT,
  start_date TIMESTAMP,
  end_date TIMESTAMP,
  due_date TIMESTAMP
)
vault.load_sql:
INSERT INTO sat_work_order_details
SELECT DISTINCT
  md5(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(wo.wo_id AS VARCHAR)))) AS work_order_hk,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS load_dts,
  NULL AS load_end_dts,
  'erp.work_orders' AS record_source,
  md5(
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(wo.qty_required AS VARCHAR), ''))) || '|' ||
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(wo.qty_stocked AS VARCHAR), ''))) || '|' ||
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(wo.qty_scrapped AS VARCHAR), ''))) || '|' ||
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(wo.start_date AS VARCHAR), ''))) || '|' ||
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(wo.end_date AS VARCHAR), ''))) || '|' ||
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(wo.due_date AS VARCHAR), '')))
  ) AS hashdiff,
  wo.qty_required,
  wo.qty_stocked,
  wo.qty_scrapped,
  wo.start_date,
  wo.end_date,
  wo.due_date
FROM stg_erp_work_orders wo
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM sat_work_order_details sat
  WHERE sat.work_order_hk = md5(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(wo.wo_id AS VARCHAR))))
  AND sat.hashdiff = md5(
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(wo.qty_required AS VARCHAR), ''))) || '|' ||
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(wo.qty_stocked AS VARCHAR), ''))) || '|' ||
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(wo.qty_scrapped AS VARCHAR), ''))) || '|' ||
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(wo.start_date AS VARCHAR), ''))) || '|' ||
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(wo.end_date AS VARCHAR), ''))) || '|' ||
    UPPER(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(wo.due_date AS VARCHAR), '')))
  )
  AND sat.load_end_dts IS NULL
)

mart.ddl:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mart_product_scrap_rate_top10 (
  product_bk VARCHAR NOT NULL,
  product_name VARCHAR,
  sku VARCHAR,
  total_qty_started BIGINT,
  total_qty_scrapped BIGINT,
  scrap_rate NUMERIC,
  mart_insert_dts TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)
mart.populate_sql: DELETE FROM mart_product_scrap_rate_top10; INSERT INTO mart_product_scrap_rate_top10 SELECT hp.product_bk, spd.product_name, spd.sku, SUM(swod.qty_required) AS total_qty_started, SUM(swod.qty_scrapped) AS total_qty_scrapped, CASE WHEN SUM(swod.qty_required) > 0 THEN ROUND(CAST(SUM(swod.qty_scrapped) AS NUMERIC) / CAST(SUM(swod.qty_required) AS NUMERIC), 4) ELSE 0 END AS scrap_rate, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS mart_insert_dts FROM hub_work_order hwo INNER JOIN sat_work_order_details swod ON hwo.work_order_hk = swod.work_order_hk INNER JOIN lnk_product_work_order lpwo ON hwo.work_order_hk = lpwo.work_order_hk INNER JOIN hub_product hp ON lpwo.product_hk = hp.product_hk LEFT JOIN sat_product_details spd ON hp.product_hk = spd.product_hk WHERE swod.load_end_dts IS NULL AND spd.load_end_dts IS NULL GROUP BY hp.product_bk, spd.product_name, spd.sku ORDER BY scrap_rate DESC LIMIT 10

columns: CASE WHEN SUM(swod.qty_started) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(swod.qty_scrapped)::NUMERIC / SUM(swod.qty_started), 4) ELSE 0 END AS scrap_rate
aggregations: CASE WHEN SUM(swod.qty_started) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(swod.qty_scrapped)::NUMERIC / SUM(swod.qty_started), 4) ELSE 0 END AS scrap_rate
